creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text: This is a contrib code, I believe the policy for contrib software is to merge fixes from upstream unless they're FreeBSD-specific. These typos were fixed in the upstream repo: https://github.com/NLnetLabs/ldns/commit/d1f8720ab88dd59a8007345aec4fe5aea9b4aff0#diff-f3ba2a96072b04d256a347403eff94e9
